metadata.description: Cadence team skills for Claude Code.

plugins.name: decision-engine-builder
plugins.description: Extract your decision-making through conversation, turn it into a scoring system.

plugins.name: advanced-skill-creator
plugins.description: Create, test, and distribute Claude skills with a self-correcting Architect path.

plugins.name: check-skill-security
plugins.description: Security audit for third-party Claude skill files before installing them. Detects prompt injection, credential exfiltration, code obfuscation, supply chain attacks, and excessive permission requests.

plugins.name: site-security-audit
plugins.description: Security audit for live, deployed web apps. Detects your stack (Vercel, Supabase, Cloudflare Workers, Firebase) and runs targeted checks: secrets in JS bundles, API endpoints without auth, platform-specific misconfigurations.

plugins.name: cc-viz
plugins.description: Generate self-contained HTML pages for diagrams, architecture overviews, diff reviews, data tables, and slide decks. Proactively replaces complex ASCII tables with styled HTML.
